sources.coverageNote: Primary serif family for Latin, Greek, and Cyrillic books.

regular.note: Available in the Noto Serif family.

italic.note: Available in the Noto Serif family.

bold.note: Available in the Noto Serif family.

boldItalic.note: Available in the Noto Serif family.

sources.coverageNote: Use Noto Serif CJK when available; Source Han Serif is the equivalent alternate family.

italic.note: Italic variants are generally unavailable for CJK serif families and must be treated as a coverage gap.

boldItalic.note: Bold-italic is generally unavailable for CJK serif families and must be treated as a coverage gap.

sources.coverageNote: Script-specific Noto families may be required depending on actual corpus coverage.

regular.note: Regular script-specific family should be selected.

italic.note: Do not assume italic exists; scanner must report if corpus requires it.

bold.note: Depends on selected script-specific Noto family.

boldItalic.note: Do not synthesize without explicit decision.

sources.coverageNote: Pick the matching Noto family per script. Some scripts may only have regular/bold coverage.

regular.note: Regular is expected in the script-specific Noto family.

italic.note: Do not assume italic exists; treat missing italic as an explicit gap.

boldItalic.note: Do not synthesize bold-italic without a later explicit decision.

sources.coverageNote: Fallback bucket for any script not yet mapped explicitly.
